Change wordpress database prefix for security reason
inspired by WordPressのプレフィックスを変更する時の手順

Current prefix
New prefix

0. Create DB backup

1. wp-config.php

$table_prefix = '';
↓
$table_prefix = '';

2.

ALTER TABLE commentmeta RENAME TO commentmeta;
ALTER TABLE comments RENAME TO comments;
ALTER TABLE links RENAME TO links;
ALTER TABLE options RENAME TO options;
ALTER TABLE postmeta RENAME TO postmeta;
ALTER TABLE posts RENAME TO posts;
ALTER TABLE term_relationships RENAME TO term_relationships;
ALTER TABLE term_taxonomy RENAME TO term_taxonomy;
ALTER TABLE usermeta RENAME TO usermeta;
ALTER TABLE users RENAME TO users;
ALTER TABLE terms RENAME TO terms;

3.

UPDATE options SET option_name = 'user_roles' WHERE option_name = 'user_roles';
UPDATE usermeta SET meta_key = 'capabilities' WHERE meta_key = 'capabilities';
UPDATE usermeta SET meta_key = 'user_level' WHERE meta_key = 'user_level';

https://github.com/regepan
